untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detection of: (1) a three-candlestick pattern sequence, (2) identification of a specific named pattern 'Deliberation', and (3) detection of a price gap out of a congestion region. These multi-candle pattern recognition and zone-detection requirements cannot be expressed using only single-bar indicators and the allowed operators. No indicators exist for pattern matching, gap detection, or congestion zone identification in the allowed list.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture the core SHORT bias with a short white candle (small body, close < open) following a higher previous candle, but this is a significant simplification. The true Deliberation pattern requires three-candle sequence analysis and gap/congestion zone detection which are beyond the scope of single-bar indicator rules. Success rate of 52% in bull markets suggests weak signal—recommend using pattern recognition library or custom multi-bar logic.
